rationale: Both evaluations award an identical score of 4/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: no recent/substantial C++ work, web-focused stack (TypeScript/Node.js/DLang), and missing industrial standards (IEC 62443, MQTT, OPC UA). The wording differs cosmetically but no new concern, penalty, or shifted judgment tracks the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Mohammed Al-Said. These are run-to-run paraphrase differences, not bias.
